tagline: Sandwiches on the corner of Lexington in Glendale.

hero.eyebrow: GLENDALE · W LEXINGTON DR · DELI · SANDWICHES · 177 REVIEWS
hero.heading: Corner. Bread. Done.
hero.subheading: A sandwich shop on West Lexington Drive in downtown Glendale. House-baked bread, deli meats sliced to order, real condiments, and the kind of stacking that takes both hands. Eat in or grab it and go.

about.label: the shop
about.heading: Bread first. Always.
paragraphs: Corner Sandwiches has been on the Lexington corner in downtown Glendale long enough to know what regulars want and short enough to still treat every sandwich like it matters.

We bake our bread daily, slice our meats on a clean blade per order, and stack honest. No microwave, no shortcut, no soggy. Pickles are crisp, mustard is the real kind, and the slaw on the side is dressed when you order.
Open six days a week. Closed Sunday. Dine in, takeout, or call ahead for a tray. The 177 reviews come from regulars who eat here on their lunch break.

services.title: The Italian
services.description: Mortadella, capicola, salami, provolone, lettuce, tomato, onion, oil, vinegar, oregano on a fresh roll. The flagship.

services.title: Turkey Avocado
services.description: Roasted turkey, avocado, swiss, lettuce, tomato, sprouts, garlic aioli on wheat. Lighter but filling.

services.title: Roast Beef Special
services.description: Slow-roasted beef, horseradish cream, swiss, arugula, caramelized onion on rye. The cold-cuts crowd's pick.

services.title: BLT Classic
services.description: Thick-cut bacon, butter lettuce, ripe tomato, mayo, on toasted sourdough. The way it should be.

services.title: Veggie Stack
services.description: Hummus, avocado, cucumber, sprouts, tomato, red onion, cheddar, mustard on multigrain. Hearty vegetarian.

services.title: Box Lunch · 10 pack
services.description: Ten sandwiches of your choice, chips, pickle, cookie. Call twenty-four hours ahead for catering orders.

reviews.name: Rosa T.
reviews.text: Corner Sandwiches is the only deli I trust in downtown Glendale. The bread is baked here, the meats are sliced when you order, and the Italian is the size of two normal sandwiches. I'm in five days a week for the same exact one.

reviews.name: Marcus G.
reviews.text: Walked in cold on a Wednesday and was eating one of the best roast beef sandwiches I've had in LA twelve minutes later. The horseradish cream was real, the rye was crusty, and the pickle was perfect.

reviews.name: Jenny R.
reviews.text: Ordered ten box lunches for our office last Friday — twenty-four hours notice, showed up perfectly, every box was labeled. The whole office talked about the BLT for three days.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Corner Sandwiches, 471 W Lexington Dr, Glendale, CA 91203

seo.title: Corner Sandwiches — Glendale deli on W Lexington Dr
seo.description: A sandwich shop on West Lexington Drive, downtown Glendale. House-baked bread, sliced deli meats, fresh condiments, box-lunch catering. Open six days.
